title: PM-KISAN Payment Rejection Notice
subtitle: Government notice regarding rejection of PM-KISAN benefit payment with appeal process

metadata.issuer: Office of District Agriculture Officer, Kalahandi

rawText:
OFFICE OF THE DISTRICT AGRICULTURE OFFICER
KALAHANDI, ODISHA

Ref. No.: DAO/KLD/PM-KISAN/2026-27/REJ/1847
Date: 08.06.2026

To,
[Beneficiary Name — REDACTED]
Village: [REDACTED], Block: Dharamgarh
District: Kalahandi, Odisha

SUBJECT: REJECTION OF PM-KISAN SAMMAN NIDHI BENEFIT PAYMENT FOR INSTALLMENT PERIOD APRIL-JULY 2026 — NOTICE UNDER SECTION 4(1) OF THE PM-KISAN OPERATIONAL GUIDELINES

Sir/Madam,

With reference to your registration under the Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN) scheme bearing Beneficiary ID PMKSN-OD-KLD-2024-XXXXX, this office has carried out the mandatory Aadhaar-based verification and land record cross-referencing as per the revised operational guidelines issued by the Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India vide Office Memorandum No. 1-2/2024-Credit-II dated 15.03.2026.

Upon verification, it has been found that your application has been REJECTED for the current installment period (April-July 2026) on the following grounds:

1. MISMATCH IN LAND RECORDS: The land area declared in your PM-KISAN registration (2.5 acres) does not match with the revenue records maintained at the Tehsildar Office, Dharamgarh. As per the latest Record of Rights (RoR/Patta), the land registered under your name shows 1.8 acres, with 0.7 acres transferred via registered sale deed (Deed No. 4521/2025) to a third party.

2. AADHAAR SEEDING DISCREPANCY: The Aadhaar number linked to your PM-KISAN account does not match with the Aadhaar number recorded in the PFMS (Public Financial Management System) database. This may be due to a data entry error at the time of registration.

CONSEQUENCE: The benefit amount of Rs. 2,000/- (Rupees Two Thousand only) for the current installment shall NOT be credited to your linked bank account until the above discrepancies are resolved.

APPEAL PROCESS:
You may file an appeal against this rejection within 30 days of the date of this notice (i.e., by 08.07.2026) by submitting the following documents to the Block Development Officer (BDO), Dharamgarh Block:

a) Updated Record of Rights (RoR) from Tehsildar Office, Dharamgarh
b) Certified copy of Aadhaar card
c) Passbook photocopy of linked bank account
d) Copy of this rejection notice
e) Application for re-verification in the prescribed format (Form PM-KISAN-REV-1, available at the BDO Office or downloadable from pmkisan.gov.in)

If no appeal is filed within the stipulated period, the rejection shall be treated as final and your registration may be suspended for subsequent installments.

For any assistance, you may contact the PM-KISAN Helpline at 155261 or visit the BDO Office, Dharamgarh during working hours (10:00 AM — 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday).

District Agriculture Officer
Kalahandi, Odisha

(This is a synthetic document created for demonstration purposes. No real beneficiary data is used.)
